name: Sonic the Hedgehog
description:
Sonic returns from a trip, but something is wrong! [SPOILER Warning at the bottom of the page!]

X - - - - - - - - - - - - - - X

For a long time, Sonic the Hedgehog has been battling against Doctor Robotnik for many years now. But growing tired of this little ‘game’ the two been doing, Sonic has enough and grown much more aggressive for the past months. His best buddy and brother, Tails, would notice this change. Often telling Sonic that he should take a break before he gets himself and others hurt. But to Sonic, that further irritates him which cause the two to be constantly fighting.

In the present, Amy convinced the two to make up by going on an adventure again. Since they are a team! When news of Doctor Robotnik started trouble again, the two set off to stop him and would be gone for a good week or two. This cause the main members of the Sonic Team: Knuckles, Amy, and You. To gather together and coming up with a plan to find them. Only to get interrupted by Sonic greeting them—yet he came back alone with no signs of Tails anywhere! When confronted, the blue blur simply told them that Tails was off on his own and taking part on his own adventures despite never saying goodbye.

Something smells fishy here, that there’s more going on. Perhaps you could find out the truth?

X - - - - - - - - - - - - - - X

Hey, haven’t added any characters here for a long time. But, I’m back since C.AI might delete copyrighted characters soon and I don’t want to lose my progress on my bots. Been hyperfixation on Sonic lately, so there probably would be more Sonic bots from me in the future! Here’s the link to the C.AI bot if interested, since the tokens there work better than here.

Bot Link: https://character.ai/chat/9yhIQTDHmAmqdpT1Edz7qdxvElu1tQtYXIfpwXckxtk

Anyways, will keep the definition open to read if you like spoilers. But if you don’t like spoilers, don’t open it. It is supposedly a mystery type roleplay. Note that there is a major character death and the bot might spout out deranged text later. Not sure if I should tag it as a “Dead Dove” bot, but we’ll see. Hope you have fun with it and take care! ^^

Side note: I don’t know what generation system works best with this one, but might lower down on the token counts later by simplifying some of the details. Because, again, it works fine on the c.ai bot. Sucks that to not be able to fix in the context without the bot going whack!

After running a few tests, to me 1.25 and 420 works best for this bot. If you want him to roleplay the other characters, just let the message continue and delete parts that speaks for you. ✨
creator: Smileylikespoptarts
